title: The Case of the Bloody Iris

sources.title: The Case Of The Bloody Iris 1972
sources.description: After leaving the clutches of a sex cult behind her, a beautiful model is pursued by a serial killer in her new apartment building.

metadata.Plot: Beautiful young model Jennifer Lansbury and her goofy friend Marilyn Ricci move into a swanky high-rise apartment after the previous tenant gets brutally murdered. Pretty soon Jennifer is being stalked by the mysterious killer. Probable suspects include a predatory lesbian neighbor, a weird old woman and her deformed son, and even the building's handsome architect who suffers from a severe blood phobia.
metadata.Actors: Edwige Fenech, George Hilton, Paola Quattrini
